violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

ROP Lobster and mahi tuna was observed thawing with the package in tact. The lobster was observed at 35 degrees and was sliced open. The mahi tuna was observed at 53 degrees with no explanation. Tuna was disposed of. All ROP seafood must be thawed with package not in tact to allow the introduction of oxygen. Owner to instruct staff of proper thawing procedures of ROP seafood. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of bio-film. Owner stated machine would be turned off and wash rinsed and sanitized. Inspector recommends increasing cleaning frequency of ice machine to prevent build up. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
